author: codex-duplication-audit

patch.value: Deduplicate comments, notes, and learnings command stacks

Duplicate audit 2026-05-22: jscpd found src/cli/commands/comments.ts, notes.ts, and learnings.ts repeat the same item lookup, add/list option handling, output shape, and mutation/history patterns. Representative clones include comments.ts:2-14 vs notes.ts:1-13, comments.ts:58-77 vs notes.ts:46-65, comments.ts:193-206 vs notes.ts:115-128, learnings.ts:1-15 vs notes.ts:1-15, learnings.ts:43-65 vs notes.ts:43-65, and learnings.ts:119-132 vs notes.ts:115-128. Search found closed implementation/parity work (pm-c465, pm-v1s1) but no active dedupe task. Fix by extracting a shared append/list annotation command factory for comments, notes, and learnings with resource-specific metadata/history labels.

comments/notes/learnings share one command core for item resolution, append/list modes, author/message handling, and output rendering; resource-specific behavior remains explicit through adapters; existing comments, notes, and learnings tests pass; pnpm build passes.

value.author: codex-active-work
value.text: Evidence: implementation extracted src/cli/commands/annotation-command.ts as the shared annotation command core. comments.ts, notes.ts, and learnings.ts now delegate list/add, limit slicing, author resolution, mutateItem append, result rendering, and ownership wrapping through the shared core while preserving comments stdin/file/includeMeta behavior and notes/learnings legacy audit aliases. Focused tests passed: PM_RUN_TESTS_SKIP_BUILD=1 node scripts/run-tests.mjs test -- tests/unit/comments-command.spec.ts tests/unit/notes-learnings-command.spec.ts tests/integration/help-runtime.spec.ts --reporter=dot => 3 files / 62 tests.

Gate covered build, typecheck, docs-skills, static quality, coverage 105 files / 1583 tests / 100 percent statements branches functions lines, version policy 2026.5.23, secret scan, npx packed-package smoke, package-first dogfood 84 workflows, npm pack dry-run, compatibility check from base 2026.5.18, and required Sentry/telemetry gate with Sentry critical=0 high=2 total=2 and telemetry finish_error_rate_pct=2.94, failures_without_error_code_rows=0.

patch.value: Implemented shared annotation command core and verified with focused tests, manual temp-project dogfood, pm validate, and full release gate.
Closed by extracting the shared annotation command core for comments, notes, and learnings.
Annotation commands share list/add, limit, author, mutation, rendering, and ownership plumbing while keeping command-specific input and audit semantics.
src/cli/commands/annotation-command.ts now owns the shared core; comments, notes, and learnings delegate to it; focused tests, manual dogfood, validate, and full release gate passed.
